column1: Determine Required Electrical Components and Purchase
column27:
Need to determine electrical components and purchase those based on the key features and criteria of system.

Specifications: 

* 5A minimun
* Multiplexer SSR or physical relay

Components:

* -Power MOSFET (5A minimum)-
* -SSR or relay (To multiplex)-
* -Connection point for array-
* -Grounding for fabric and static-

column63: 23/Apr/26 1:30 PM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;Going to go with a physical automotive relay that is a single throw, double throw. Then use a combo of those to create a tree for which array to use.

column62: 05/Mar/26 2:30 PM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;I determined that most of the ERDC samples are not ready to be tested and need to be ground down to a smaller particle size. Created a new task for preparing those samples in order to get this task done.
column63: 05/Mar/26 2:55 PM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;I did do some baseline measurements of the paraffin wax, as seen in the ERCD meeting. Trialed the sample pre-method and it was ok, will try some different type of methods to produce better samples.
column64: 12/Mar/26 2:14 PM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;We have to process CNT samples before we can test it. The CNT is too coarse to work with, I have tried to refine by hand but that is taking much longer than anticipated. Looking into a roller mill to help with this.
column65: 23/Mar/26 11:04 AM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;Bob has ordered the 5 extra waveguide shims on Friday. Waiting for shipping information from Pasternack.
column66: 02/Apr/26 1:14 PM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;There are 12 samples between CNT, GO, GH, CB. So I am going to shrink this task down to just the CNT and present those finding in this next meeting on Tuesday.
column67: 09/Apr/26 2:33 PM;712020:a91169b6-cfe5-4669-9aef-236f054c1307;I have the CNT samples ready and they are current melting and being mixed. Will pour one of the sample in the waveguide and start measurements tomorrow.
